_workflow_info.title: Inpainting - Simple Method (SetLatentNoiseMask)
_workflow_info.description: Uses any general model + SetLatentNoiseMask. The mask restricts sampling to marked areas. Simpler but may have harder edges than VAEEncodeForInpaint method.

_meta.notes: Load image WITH alpha channel (transparency = mask area), or use MaskEditor to draw mask after loading

_meta.title: SetLatentNoiseMask
_meta.notes: Attaches the mask to the latent dict as noise_mask. During sampling, KSamplerX0Inpaint will only denoise within masked regions and keep unmasked regions as original latent.

inputs.text: a cute cat sitting on a chair, detailed fur, photorealistic

_meta.notes: For inpainting, denoise 0.7-1.0 is typical. Higher denoise = more creative freedom in masked area.
